turn.content: No... no, no, no! This isn't real! My head... it's too loud... Wait, what did he just say? You have to choose... me or...  who else? Who are you?!
You! Get away from me! Don't look at me like that, it's like you want to help! Nobody's choosing... nobody's killing you for my sake, you're... you're just a... stranger!
Please, no, it can't be true... We need to get out! I have a family! My wife, Sarah! My dog, Max! We have to escape! Let me go!
NO! This isn't about escape, this bastard won't even... will he? Will he let us leave? I work in a dentist office, I have nobody... don't make me do this...

(sneering) Ah, poor baby, family this, family that. We're not playing by your rules here. Six minutes. One of you's going to give in eventually. And that's when I'll let the other live. Or, at least, for as long as I deem necessary. Your families, friends, everything outside these walls – they're nothing to me. You two are my show, my game. The world outside's fading away for you both, only one choice left. Make it, or I'll take care of both of you myself.
(hyperventilating) Oh God, I'm going to die... I'm really going to die... My wife... my family... what have I done?!

Stop it, stop it, stop it, just stop! You're not helping either of us! Think, just think... we get one chance, one stupid chance to get out of this. Don't make it about anyone else, think about yourself!

message: Run failed (gen 1, variant 0) — Groq API may be unavailable.
